Message: The Windows Installer service could not be accessed
Resolution: Verify the Windows Installer service is running (msiserver).
The user or a system process cancelled the install. If silent, check for UI prompts that blocked automation.
Check the MSI verbose log. Common causes: app already installed, SYSTEM account permissions issue, encrypted temp folder, insufficient disk space, locked files.

Message: This action is only valid for products that are currently installed
Resolution: The product is not installed. This typically occurs during uninstall attempts on a product that was already removed.

Message: The installation source for this product is not available
Resolution: The MSI source path is invalid or inaccessible. Verify content is on the DP.

Message: Another installation is already in progress
Resolution: Wait for the other installation to complete. Check for stuck msiexec.exe processes.

Message: This installation package could not be opened
Resolution: The MSI file is corrupt or missing. Re-download and redistribute content.
Check permissions on the log file path. Verify the log directory exists.
The MST transform file is invalid or incompatible with this MSI version.

Message: This installation is forbidden by system policy
Resolution: Group Policy is blocking the installation. Check Software Restriction Policies or AppLocker.

Message: This installation package is not supported by this processor type
Resolution: Wrong architecture. Check if the MSI is x86 vs x64 and ensure it matches the target OS.

Message: This patch package could not be opened
Resolution: The MSP patch file is corrupt or missing. Re-download and redistribute content.

Message: Another version of this product is already installed
Resolution: Uninstall the existing version first, or use a major upgrade MSI.

Message: The installer has initiated a restart
Resolution: The install succeeded but triggered a reboot. This is a success code.

Message: The upgrade patch cannot be installed because the program being upgraded may be missing
Resolution: The base product must be installed before applying the patch.

Message: A restart is required to complete the install (SUCCESS_REBOOT_REQUIRED)
Resolution: Install succeeded. A reboot is needed to finalize. MECM may mask this as a failure if exit code handling is not configured.
